blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.0 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,090 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.9" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 22.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 9" over the past week. Current depth: 34".
